title: US summer heat: 5 cooling tricks people around world have used for generations
summary_full: As record-breaking heatwaves grip the US and Europe, millions are seeking affordable ways to stay cool. Surprisingly, ancient wisdom from hotter climates offers effective solutions. From blocking sunlight and using water for natural cooling to wearing loose clothing and designing homes for airflow, these time-tested techniques are proving invaluable. Discover how centuries-old traditions are now guiding modern approaches to beat the heat
